content.json:
## Agent Health & Operational Insights
Monitor Arc agent versions, connectivity health, service status, cloud provider distribution, and license compliance across your estate.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend agentVersion = tostring(properties.agentVersion)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by agentVersion
| order by agentVersion asc
content.title: Agent Version Distribution

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend cloudProvider = coalesce(tostring(properties.cloudMetadata.provider), 'On-Premises / Unknown')
| summarize ServerCount = count() by cloudProvider
content.title: Cloud Provider Distribution

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend status = tostring(properties.status)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by status
content.title: Connection Status (All Servers)

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend licenseType = coalesce(tostring(properties.licenseProfile.licenseType), 'Not Set')
| summarize ServerCount = count() by licenseType
content.title: License Type Distribution

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.status == 'Disconnected'
| extend lastStatusChange = tostring(properties.lastStatusChange)
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osType)
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| extend agentVersion = tostring(properties.agentVersion)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project Name = name, subscriptionName, resourceGroup, osType, osSku, agentVersion, lastStatusChange, location
| order by lastStatusChange asc
content.title: Disconnected Servers

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend extensionServiceStatus = tostring(properties.serviceStatuses.extensionService.status)
| extend gcServiceStatus = tostring(properties.serviceStatuses.guestConfigurationService.status)
| where extensionServiceStatus != 'Running' or gcServiceStatus != 'Running'
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osType)
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osType, extensionServiceStatus, gcServiceStatus, Status = tostring(properties.status)
| order by Name asc
content.title: Servers with Degraded Services

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend licenseType = coalesce(tostring(properties.licenseProfile.licenseType), 'Not Set')
| extend softwareAssurance = coalesce(tostring(properties.licenseProfile.softwareAssuranceCustomer), 'Unknown')
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osType)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by licenseType, softwareAssurance, osType
| order by licenseType asc, softwareAssurance asc
content.title: License Compliance Summary
